no: REMOVED FROM ULTIMATE PRESET — all components require SPWI100.spl (Dancing Lights, IWD cantrip) which is not created by any mod in the preset. The EET scroll list references it but no installed mod provides it. Not a bug in this mod — it's a missing dependency.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

ki.pattern: ERROR Installing \[Missing Spell Scrolls\]|ERROR Installing \[Leveled Scrolls\]|ERROR Installing \[Caster Crafting\]
ki.description: All components require spell scroll files (e.g. SPWI100.spl) created by Talents of Faerun's IWD spell import (cn:1500). If ToF's IWD spell batch fails or is not installed, the scroll files don't exist and mod-caster-crafting fails. Not a bug in this mod — cascade failure from upstream ToF.
ki.workaround: Ensure Talents of Faerun cn:1500 (IWD arcane spell imports) installed successfully. Check ToF's install log for errors. If ToF is not in your install, these components cannot be used.

sum: Mod for Infinity Engine games that introduces crafting (scrolls, potions, wands) for casters (mage, cleric, druid, etc.)

co.n: Add in missing arcane spell scrolls
co.tp2n: Add in missing arcane spell scrolls

co.n: Add in missing priest spell scrolls
co.tp2n: Add in missing priest spell scrolls

co.n: Missing Spell Scrolls -> Add in missing arcane and priest spell scrolls
co.tp2n: Add in missing arcane and priest spell scrolls

co.n: Leveled Scrolls: craft scrolls at higher caster levels
co.tp2n: Leveled Scrolls: craft scrolls at higher caster levels

co.n: Copy Spells from Party Member Spellbooks
co.tp2n: Copy Spells from Party Member Spellbooks

co.n: Caster Crafting: Scribing Tools -> Copy Spells from Party Member Spellbooks AND Scribe scrolls
co.tp2n: Copy Spells from Party Member Spellbooks AND Scribe scrolls

co.n: Caster Crafting: Crafting Station -> Brew potions

co.no: Wands portion not yet implemented by mod author

co.n: Both brew potions and craft wands (Not yet implemented)
co.tp2n: Both brew potions and craft wands (Not yet implemented)
co.no: Wands portion not yet implemented by mod author
